description_long: This is a visually striking teapot with a tall, rounded body that transitions from a deep red at the top to a blue hue at the base, creating a gradient effect. The teapot features a prominent, elegantly curved handle attached at the upper and lower sides, forming a loop with a decorative flourish near the bottom. It has two spouts, one above the other, both extending outward and slightly upward from the front, giving it a whimsical, almost fantastical appearance. The lid is domed with a rounded knob on top, fitting snugly into the opening. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments. This teapot would stand out as a unique piece in any urban kitchen or café setting.
description: A tall, gradient red-to-blue teapot with a domed lid, two upward-angled spouts, and a large, ornate curved handle. Its smooth, glossy surface and whimsical design make it visually distinctive.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen from a three-quarter angle, highlighting both spouts, the ornate handle, and the domed lid.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the two vertically aligned spouts and the rounded body, with the handle mostly hidden.
description_view_2: The opposite three-quarter view displays the handle's full curve and both spouts, with the body’s gradient coloring clearly visible.
description_view_3: A rear view focuses on the handle's attachment and curve, with the spouts not visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: Two spouts, both straight and angled slightly upward, positioned vertically on the front of the body.
attribute_handle_design: Large, ornate loop handle with a thick, rounded form, attached at the upper and lower sides with a decorative curl at the bottom.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed with a rounded knob, fits snugly.
